data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Protects data by encrypting it from the source to the destination.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption standard for video and metadata.

data.title: Bot and Spam Detection
data.description: Utilizes algorithms to identify and mitigate bot activity and spam on the platform.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models trained on known spam patterns.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Provides an additional layer of security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Supports SMS and authenticator apps for 2FA.

data.title: Secure API Gateways
data.description: Ensures secure interactions between services through robust API security protocols.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates distributed denial-of-service attacks to keep services operational.
data.technical_spec: Traffic analysis and mitigation tools monitor and restrict suspicious activity.
